_comment: Manifest of UniProt accessions with a Schweke et al. 2024 (PMID 38325366) AF2 homo-oligomer model committed under this directory. Each entry: af_model_num (the _V1_N suffix on Schweke's figshare filename) + ecd_only (true when Schweke's nodiso3 contact-clustering filter stripped the TM helix, leaving only the soluble ECD) + stoichiometry (cyclic-symmetry order N — 2 for AF_dimer_models_core dimer, 3..13 for an AnAnaS-reconstructed full complex from full_complexes_bigbang). PDB file naming: dimers are {ACC}_V1_{N}.pdb, higher-order are {ACC}_V1_{N}_c{stoichiometry}.pdb. Cross-references to data/external/schweke_homomer_atlas/PROVENANCE.md for the bulk-extract recipe.
